title: Phase 1B Food + Connectivity + Urgent Help
summary: Second premium implementation-prep lane for Vietnam, focused on the table, the phone, and the official-help moments where a traveler stops feeling in control.
whyFirst: This lane strengthens the $4.99 story with repair, recovery, clarification, cost-control, and urgent escalation before widening into softer convenience depth.

scenarios.whyIncluded: Food premium should fix wrong or risky meals, not just add more ordering vocabulary.
Connectivity failures break maps, rides, payments, and check-ins, so this is core recovery value.
Practical human support becomes premium-worthy when the traveler needs translation, printing, escort, or a call they cannot make alone.
Urgent escalation needs specific police, passport, theft, and safety-next-step phrasing, not just generic panic lines.

notes: This lane started as a prepared-not-live premium scaffold and was promoted into the live 500-family Viet pack during the autonomous completion pass.
The preparedDelta math remains useful as the historical size of this lane.
If stacked after phase1-repair-recovery-core, the prepared-not-live math would have become 117 / 76 / 193 before the final promotion work.
The preparedBoundaryIfPromoted field below is historical pre-promotion staging math, not the current live boundary.
